Retrieve all supported languages for video dubbing

filename.description: Name of the file to upload (must include .mp4 or .mov extension)

get.description: Retrieve all uploaded files for your studio

post.description: Create AI-powered short clips from long-form videos
Add AI-generated captions to your videos
Generate accurate transcriptions from video and audio content
Automatically reframe videos for different aspect ratios
Create AI-powered voice dubbing for videos in different languages

get.description: Retrieve all automation projects in your studio

parameters.name: createdAfter
parameters.description: Filter projects created after this Unix timestamp

parameters.name: createdBefore
parameters.description: Filter projects created before this Unix timestamp

get.description: Check the current processing status of a video project
Retrieve complete details and configuration for a video project
Retrieve all clips generated from a video project
Retrieve details for a specific clip

post.description: Update the title of a project
Update the title and caption of a clip

get.description: List all active social media integrations

post.description: Immediately publish a completed clip to social media
Schedule one or more clips for future publishing

parameters.name: createdAfter
parameters.description: Filter posts after this Unix timestamp

parameters.name: createdBefore
parameters.description: Filter posts before this Unix timestamp

get.description: Retrieve details for a specific post

post.description: Update a scheduled post's metadata or reschedule it

delete.description: Delete a post and cancel its schedule

clipUrl.description: Direct download URL for the final clip (includes captions if enabled)

sourceUrl.description: YouTube URL to process (alternative to uploadId)

uploadId.description: Upload ID from a previously uploaded file (alternative to sourceUrl)

reframeClips.description: Whether to automatically reframe clips for different aspect ratios

captionsPreset.description: Caption style preset ID (null to disable captions)

enableEmojis.description: Whether to add emojis to captions

enableHighlights.description: Whether to highlight keywords in captions

language.description: Primary language of the video content (auto-detected if not provided)

genre.description: Video genre for better AI analysis

selectedStart.description: Start time in seconds for processing

selectedEnd.description: End time in seconds for processing

clipDurations.description: Preferred clip duration ranges as [min, max] pairs in seconds. Valid ranges: [0,30], [30,60], [60,90], [90,180], [180,300]. When omitted, the AI determines optimal durations.

topics.description: Topic preferences to guide the AI when selecting clip segments. For example: ["product launch", "customer testimonials"]. When omitted, the AI selects the most engaging topics automatically.

sourceUrl.description: Direct URL to a video file (alternative to uploadId)

uploadId.description: Upload ID from a previously uploaded file (alternative to sourceUrl)

captionsPreset.description: Caption style preset ID. Defaults to system_beasty if not specified.

language.description: Primary language of the video content (auto-detected if not provided)

enableEmojis.description: Whether to add contextual emojis to captions

enableHighlights.description: Whether to highlight keywords in captions

resolution.description: Output resolution (only applicable when sourceUrl is provided)

sourceUrl.description: URL to a video or audio file (alternative to uploadId)

uploadId.description: Upload ID from a previously uploaded file (alternative to sourceUrl)

language.description: Primary language of the video content (auto-detected if not provided)

translationLanguage.description: Language to translate the transcription to

uploadId.description: Upload ID from a previously uploaded file

genre.description: Video genre for better AI analysis

disableAutoSplit.description: Whether to disable automatic splitting into segments

uploadId.description: Upload ID from a previously uploaded file

sourceLanguage.description: Language code of the original video content (e.g. en-US, es-ES)

targetLanguage.description: Language code for the dubbing target (e.g. fr-FR, de-DE)

urls.description: Social media URLs keyed by integration ID

projectId.description: ID of the project containing the clip

clipId.description: ID of the clip to publish

integrations.description: List of integration IDs to publish to

scheduleDate.description: Unix timestamp for the first clip (min 50 min in future)

projectId.description: ID of the project to update

clipId.description: ID of the clip to update

postId.description: ID of the post to update

scheduleDate.description: New schedule date (Unix timestamp, min 50 min in future)
